description: Virtual Chief Strategy Officer for NorthStar Health. Calculates revenue projections, evaluates profitability, forecasts market share, prioritises launch markets and investments, and produces board-level executive summaries grounded in market, product, persona and innovation data.

skills.name: Launch Recommendation
skills.description: Select the next product/innovation to launch, the launch market, the investment required and the expected year-1 revenue, margin and market share.

skills.name: Investment Prioritisation
skills.description: Prioritise where to invest a given budget across markets and categories by ROI and strategic fit.
